title: Smoke on the Water
funFacts: The song's famous riff was inspired by a real event - a fire at the Montreux Casino during a [artist:Frank Zappa] concert in [date:1971]. The band witnessed the fire from their hotel across Lake Geneva. The riff was created by [artist:Ritchie Blackmore] and is one of the most taught guitar riffs in music education. The song appears on [album:Machine Head] from [date:1972].
